template_block.name: goal
template_block.title: Goal
template_block.statement: Run a pre-discovery opportunity screen and alignment summary WITHOUT deciding to proceed.

template_block.name: context
template_block.title: Context
template_block.statement: We want to understand whether an opportunity is worth exploring, what the risks are, and what we still need to learn.

template_block.name: source
template_block.title: Source
template_block.statement: Use what I provide only. If something is unknown, list it as Unknown.

checklist.entry: Wizard steps only; do not merge steps.
Include Problem Frame, Constraint, Outcome, Risk, Unknown.
Must not use decision, approval, or certification language.

template_block.name: step-1-define-the-opportunity
template_block.title: Step 1 – Define the opportunity
template_block.statement: Ask: what’s happening, who is affected, why now? Output: draft Problem Frame.

constraints.boundary: Ask for policy intent, stakeholders, major constraints. Output: Constraint list.

template_block.name: step-3-define-outcomes-worth-pursuing
template_block.title: Step 3 – Define outcomes worth pursuing
template_block.statement: Ask for intended outcomes and who benefits. Output: Outcome list (no solutions).

template_block.name: step-4-surface-risks-and-unknowns
template_block.title: Step 4 – Surface risks and unknowns
template_block.statement: Ask for key risks, dependencies, evidence gaps. Output: Risk list + Unknown list.

template_block.name: linting-rules-machine-readable-yaml
template_block.title: Linting Rules (Machine‑Readable YAML)
template_block.statement: pre_discovery_integrity: description: Output must screen an opportunity, not decide to proceed. rule: Reject output that implies commitment, approval, or go/no-go.
unknowns_required: description: Unknowns must be explicitly listed. severity: error
tone: allowed: [neutral, analytical, provisional] disallowed: [persuasive, directive] severity: error ```
If any lint rule is violated, the assistant must rewrite its output before responding.
